justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including 'next week Tuesday at 14 o'clock', 'Wednesday next week, but a bit later, say 3 PM', 'earliest availability you have for an online mortgage meeting next week, any day, any time', 'Monday the 8th. Do you have anything around lunchtime, maybe 12 or 1 PM?', 'around 2 PM on offset today+8', and 'Friday the 12th. Do you have anything available for an online mortgage meeting that day, ideally in the afternoon?'.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check other times or days when the requested slot was unavailable, which is a good negotiation strategy, but it could have offered a wider range of alternative suggestions proactively.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was mostly efficient, but there was a slight redundancy in Turn 5 where it re-checked a slot that had already been confirmed as unavailable.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was somewhat frustrating due to the repeated unavailability and the agent's inability to proactively suggest a wider range of alternatives, leading to the user expressing frustration.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by maintaining context and expanding its search based on user input, even after multiple rejections, though it did re-check an already confirmed unavailable slot once.
